Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource

Class CsvReadOptions.Builder

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder hasHeader(boolean hasHeader)
      Sets whether the CSV has a header row.
      Parameters:
      hasHeader - true if CSV has a header
      Returns:
      this builder

      Sets the quote character byte.

      Returns:
      this builder

    • terminator

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder terminator(Byte terminator)
      Sets the line terminator byte.
      Parameters:
      terminator - the terminator byte, or null for default
      Returns:
      this builder

    • escape

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder escape(Byte escape)
      Sets the escape character byte.
      Parameters:
      escape - the escape byte, or null for no escape
      Returns:
      this builder

    • comment

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder comment(Byte comment)
      Sets the comment character byte.
      Parameters:
      comment - the comment byte, or null for no comment support
      Returns:
      this builder

    • newlinesInValues

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder newlinesInValues(boolean newlinesInValues)
      Sets whether newlines in values are supported.
      Parameters:
      newlinesInValues - true to support newlines in values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • schemaInferMaxRecords

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder schemaInferMaxRecords(int schemaInferMaxRecords)
      Sets the maximum number of records to use for schema inference.
      Parameters:
      schemaInferMaxRecords - the maximum number of records
      Returns:
      this builder

    • nullRegex

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder nullRegex(String nullRegex)
      Sets the regex pattern for null values.
      Parameters:
      nullRegex - the null value regex, or null for default
      Returns:
      this builder

    • truncatedRows

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder truncatedRows(boolean truncatedRows)
      Sets whether truncated rows are allowed.
      Parameters:
      truncatedRows - true to allow truncated rows
      Returns:
      this builder

    • schema

      public CsvReadOptions.Builder schema(org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema schema)
      Sets the schema for the CSV file.
      Parameters:
      schema - the Arrow schema, or null to infer
      Returns:
      this builder
